allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { "node: $\($node.Source\)"; node --version } else { "node: NOT FOUND" }; $npm = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($npm\) { "npm: $\($npm.Source\)"; npm --version } else { "npm: NOT FOUND" }; $winget = \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($winget\) { "winget: available" } else { "winget: NOT FOUND" })
